title: ROYAL FAMILY KIDS CAMP - 211info
text: FOR THE CHILDREN ROYAL FAMILY KIDS CAMP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides camps and mentoring programs for children who have experienced abuse, neglect, or abandonment. Offers individual attention with one counselor for every one or two children. Locator Santa Ana, CA 92704 Eligibility: Children ages 6-12 in foster care with an active child welfare case Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (714) 438-2494 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (714) 438-2494 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Children must be referred by a social worker at the state Department of Human Services. Foster parents can call Royal Family KIDS for information or to help facilitate a connection between the nonprofit and the child's DHS social worker. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Camps * Foster Children Mentoring Programs * Foster Children If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FOR THE CHILDREN
